charging_inactive.reason: Stop active battery charging before changing this setting.

safe_configuration_mode.reason: This setting can only be changed while the inverter is in Power On, Standby, or Fault mode.

fault_mode.reason: This action is only available while the inverter is in Fault mode.

remote_control_enabled.reason: Remote control is disabled by the current Turn On Mode setting.

groups.title: Output
groups.description: Output priority and nominal output parameters.

groups.title: Charging
groups.description: Charging source priority and current limits.

groups.title: Battery
groups.description: Battery settings, thresholds, and equalization behavior.

groups.title: System
groups.description: General inverter operating modes, restart behavior, and front-panel options.

battery_bulk_voltage.title: Battery Bulk Voltage
battery_bulk_voltage.change_summary: Changes the target voltage used during the main battery charge stage.
battery_bulk_voltage.note: Battery bulk voltage in tenths of volts.

battery_equalization_interval.title: Battery Equalization Interval
battery_equalization_interval.change_summary: Changes the interval between equalization cycles.

battery_equalization_mode.title: Battery Equalization
battery_equalization_mode.change_summary: Enables or disables the battery equalization mode.

battery_equalization_timeout.title: Battery Equalization Timeout
battery_equalization_timeout.change_summary: Changes the timeout after which equalization exits automatically.

battery_equalization_voltage.title: Battery Equalization Voltage
battery_equalization_voltage.change_summary: Changes the target battery equalization voltage.
battery_equalization_voltage.note: Battery equalization voltage in tenths of volts.

battery_float_voltage.title: Battery Float Voltage
battery_float_voltage.change_summary: Changes the maintenance voltage applied after bulk charging is complete.
battery_float_voltage.note: Battery float voltage in tenths of volts.

battery_overvoltage_protection_voltage.title: Battery Overvoltage Protection
battery_overvoltage_protection_voltage.change_summary: Changes the battery overvoltage protection threshold.
battery_overvoltage_protection_voltage.note: Battery overvoltage protection point in tenths of volts.

battery_redischarge_voltage.title: Battery Redischarge Voltage
battery_redischarge_voltage.change_summary: Changes the threshold at which the inverter resumes battery discharge after charging.
battery_redischarge_voltage.note: Battery redischarge voltage in tenths of volts.

battery_under_voltage.title: Battery Under Voltage
battery_under_voltage.change_summary: Changes the low-battery protection threshold that can force source switching.
battery_under_voltage.note: Battery under-voltage threshold in tenths of volts.

battery_under_voltage_off_grid.title: Battery Under Voltage Off-Grid
battery_under_voltage_off_grid.change_summary: Changes the low-battery protection threshold used in off-grid mode.
battery_under_voltage_off_grid.note: Battery low-voltage protection point in off-grid mode, in tenths of volts.

buzzer_mode.title: Buzzer Mode
buzzer_mode.change_summary: Controls when the inverter buzzer is allowed to sound.

choices.label: Mute
choices.description: Mute the buzzer in all situations.

choices.label: Source Change, Warning, Fault
choices.description: Sound on input source changes and on specific warnings or faults.

choices.label: Warning and Fault
choices.description: Sound only for specific warnings or faults.

choices.label: Fault Only
choices.description: Sound only when a fault occurs.

charge_source_priority.title: Charge Source Priority
charge_source_priority.change_summary: Changes which sources are allowed to charge the battery.

lcd_auto_return_mode.title: LCD Auto Return
lcd_auto_return_mode.change_summary: Controls whether the LCD returns to the home page automatically after one minute.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Do not return to the home page automatically.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Return to the home page automatically after one minute.

lcd_backlight_mode.title: LCD Backlight
lcd_backlight_mode.change_summary: Controls whether the LCD backlight stays on continuously or turns off automatically.

choices.label: Timed Off
choices.description: Allow the LCD backlight to turn off automatically.

choices.label: Always On
choices.description: Keep the LCD backlight on continuously.

low_dc_cutoff_soc.title: Low DC Cut-Off SOC
low_dc_cutoff_soc.change_summary: Changes the battery SOC threshold used for low-DC cut-off.

low_dc_protection_soc_grid_mode.title: Low DC Protection SOC in Grid Mode
low_dc_protection_soc_grid_mode.change_summary: Changes the battery SOC threshold that triggers low-DC protection while grid mode is active.

max_ac_charge_current.title: Max AC Charge Current
max_ac_charge_current.change_summary: Changes the maximum charging current that may come from AC/utility.
max_ac_charge_current.note: Maximum AC charge current in tenths of amps.

max_charge_current.title: Max Charge Current
max_charge_current.change_summary: Changes the overall battery charging current limit.
max_charge_current.note: Maximum charge current in tenths of amps.

output_rating_frequency.title: Output Rating Frequency
output_rating_frequency.change_summary: Changes the nominal AC output frequency target.
output_rating_frequency.note: Output rating frequency in hundredths of Hz.

output_rating_voltage.title: Output Rating Voltage
output_rating_voltage.change_summary: Changes the nominal output voltage target reported by the inverter.
output_rating_voltage.note: Output rating voltage in tenths of volts.

over_temperature_restart_mode.title: Over Temperature Restart
over_temperature_restart_mode.change_summary: Controls whether the inverter may restart automatically after an over-temperature event.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Do not restart automatically after over-temperature.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Restart automatically after over-temperature when conditions allow.

overload_bypass_mode.title: Overload Bypass
overload_bypass_mode.change_summary: Controls whether the inverter may bypass output during overload conditions.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Do not switch to bypass automatically on overload.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Allow automatic bypass during overload conditions.

overload_restart_mode.title: Overload Restart
overload_restart_mode.change_summary: Controls whether the inverter may restart automatically after an overload event.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Do not restart automatically after overload.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Restart automatically after overload when conditions allow.

power_saving_mode.title: Power Saving
power_saving_mode.change_summary: Controls whether inverter power-saving mode is enabled.

solar_battery_utility_return_soc_thresho.title: Return To Solar-Battery-Utility Threshold
solar_battery_utility_return_soc_thresho.change_summary: Changes the battery SOC threshold that returns the inverter to Solar-Battery-Utility after low-DC protection.

turn_on_mode.title: Turn On Mode
turn_on_mode.change_summary: Controls whether the inverter may be turned on locally, remotely, or by both methods.

choices.label: Local and Remote
choices.description: Allow the inverter to be turned on both locally and remotely.

choices.label: Local Only
choices.description: Restrict turn-on to the local front panel.

choices.label: Remote Only
choices.description: Restrict turn-on to remote control only.
